text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm Vodka! We're partners now, so let's both do
our best!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win races and become the coolest
runner of all! That's my ambition!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's someone out there I've just gotta beat! So
you can bet I'll be trying real hard, and I'm
counting on you to do the same!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
